description: No mechanism to limit sending rate when receiver is congested — buffer may overflow in memory during heavy load especially with layered composition (Composite -> multiple children)
proposed_solution: Add BackpressureStrategy to TransportConfig with throttle/callback/pause-resume based on buffer_size or ack latency; apply limits on asyncio.Queue in _merge_parallel_streams

description: WSKeepAlivePolicy exists in _ws_keepalive.py for WebSocketTransporter — but TCPTransporter and UDSTransporter have no heartbeat mechanism; long-lived TCP connections may be silently closed by kernel/proxy
proposed_solution: Add setsockopt to enable TCP_KEEPALIVE + TCP_KEEPIDLE/TCP_KEEPINTVL or add optional HeartbeatConfig to BaseTransporter; UDS needs special solution (simple ping frames); false; 0.2.16.f heartbeat.py; true; transport/

description: Every byte passes through serialize->compress->channel and back — no memory-mapped or file descriptor passing for large payloads (files > 100MB consume duplicate memory)
proposed_solution: Add optional LargePayloadHandler that detects >threshold and reads/writes from temporary file or mmap instead of RAM; pass file descriptor via UDS as immediate solution for same-device; false; 0.2.17.f large_payload_handler.py; true; transport/
